title: Untitled Game

suggestions.title: Reduce initial difficulty spike

implementation_steps: Find initial spawn rate or enemy count

suggestions.title: Implement core game loop
suggestions.description: Game appears mostly empty. Implement basic game mechanics.

suggestions.title: Add sprite animations
suggestions.description: Create visual sprites for player, enemies, and effects.

suggestions.title: Add sound effects and music
suggestions.description: Games with audio are more engaging. Add SFX and background music.
suggestions.code_location: Add sfx() and music() calls throughout gameplay

summary:
